description_long: This object is a round, slightly flattened peach with a pale, creamy white skin and a subtle pink blush concentrated around the central groove. The surface is covered in a fine, velvety fuzz, giving it a soft and matte appearance. One side features a shallow dimple with a faint vertical crease, while the opposite side displays a small, dried stem remnant surrounded by a hint of green and pink. The overall shape is somewhat asymmetrical, with gentle bulges and a natural indentation along the suture line. The coloration transitions smoothly from white to pink, with the pink hue more pronounced near the groove and base. The peach appears fresh, with only minor natural markings and no significant blemishes.
description: A round, pale white peach with a soft pink blush and a velvety, matte surface. It features a central groove, a small stem remnant, and subtle natural markings.
description_view_0: The peach is seen from the side with a pronounced pink blush and a central groove running vertically, showing the soft, fuzzy texture.
description_view_1: This view shows the rounded, pale top of the peach with minimal pink coloration and a smooth, slightly domed surface.
description_view_2: The base of the peach is visible, featuring a small, dried stem remnant surrounded by a faint green and pink area, with the groove converging at the bottom.
description_view_3: A side view highlighting the asymmetrical bulge and a transition from white to pink, with the fuzzy texture clearly visible.
